mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TF_PROJECT_MEMBER( ID, PROJECT_ID, USER_ID, PROJECT_ROLE, STATUS, JOINED_AT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES( #{id}, #{projectId}, #{userId}, #{projectRole}, #{status}, #{joinedAt}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_PROJECT_MEMBER SET PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}, USER_ID = #{userId}, PROJECT_ROLE = #{projectRole}, STATUS = #{status}, JOINED_AT = #{joinedAt}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt} WHERE ID = #{id}
